summary: Good soundboard recording of a strong second set highlighted by Lost Sailor > Saint, but the first set is missing and tracks 3‑5 are duplicated.
review: The set captures an energetic performance with a standout Lost Sailor > Saint sequence and solid drums/space, and reviewers note the soundboard source sounds good overall. However, the release is incomplete—missing the entire first set—and contains repeated tracks, which limits its usefulness as a definitive document of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer rates it highly for performance and sound quality, while another points out major completeness issues; with limited data the rating balances strong musical moments against recording deficiencies.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as good quality, but the release suffers from missing first‑set material and duplicated tracks (3‑5), indicating a flawed source/compilation.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows well with nice drums/space, but the absence of the first set and repeated tracks disrupt overall continuity.
